text: I am struck by the contrast between the sterile, technological atmosphere of the first room—with its glass walls, glowing lights, and focused people—and the vibrant, hopeful narrative of research and development in the second. In both spaces, there is a sense of pursuit: of knowledge, of innovation, of collaboration. I feel quietly inspired, yet a little detached, as if caught between the tangible mechanics of progress and the abstract dreams that fuel it.
